arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'prepared' to pay 'in excess of £103m' for Arsenal superstar who could replace 24-year-old
arts.sum: Real Madrid are allegedly willing to pay in excess of £103m in order to sign Arsenal attacker Bukayo Saka during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: What's gone wrong at Real Madrid? Issues can be fixed but there's not much time
arts.sum: "Compared to last year, we've lacked a bit of collective attitude," Ancelotti said last week, after Madrid's Champions League title defence came to an end. One of Ancelotti's favourite phrases during Madrid's 2023-24 Double-winning campaign was "collective commitment," constantly praising the side's lack of egos, and the willingness of superstars like Bellingham and Vinícius to put their talents at the service of the team.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Vinicius Junior's Los Blancos future 'clear' amid reports of £255m Saudi Arabia bid
arts.sum: Real Madrid attacker Vinicius Junior is allegedly on the verge of agreeing a new long-term deal at Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid XI vs Getafe – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid make the short trip to Getafe tonight aiming to keep alive their La Liga title dream. The Spanish champions are seven points behind leaders Barcelona, ahead of this evening’s game in hand. arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr makes big decision on Real Madrid future
arts.sum: Vinicius Jr. will remain a cornerstone of Real Madrid, with a contract extension set to be announced at the end of the season, according to Manu Carreño on Spain’s El Larguero (Cadena SER) . Vinicius’ potential departure had been a growing point of speculation in recent months, as Saudi clubs continue to lure global stars with massive contracts.

arts.ttl: Getafe vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Getafe in yet another crucial LaLiga game where Los Blancos will need to earn the three points in order to stay alive in the race for the 2024-25 title. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Asencio, Tchouameni, Fran Garcia, Camavinga, Ceballos, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius.

arts.ttl: “I’m fine at Liverpool” – Reds player says he’s aware of transfer interest, but not rushing to go
arts.sum: Liverpool’s Alexis Mac Allister has been linked with a move to Real Madrid in the summer window. Last Monday, Marca journalist José Félix Díaz stated the 26-year-old is a target for Real Madrid. A day later, Díaz said the Liverpool star is ahead of Real Sociedad’s Martín Zubimendi in Real Madrid’s list.
